Red Blood Cell (RBC) Indices 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/red-blood-cell-rbc-indices/ 
Red Blood Cell (RBC) Indices 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are red blood cell (RBC) indices? 
Red blood cell (RBC) indices measure your red blood cells' size, shape, and quality. Red blood cells are also known as erythrocytes. They are made in your bone marrow (the spongy tissue inside your large bones). They contain hemoglobin, an iron-rich protein in your red blood cells that carries oxygen
